description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Dockers that triggers on published releases. The workflow should have concurrent job execution with cancellation of in-progress jobs. It should have two ubuntu-latest jobs, full and slim, that check out the repository, set up QEMU, Docker Buildx, and login to Docker Hub. For each job, generate Docker metadata, build and push the Docker image to Docker Hub with specific tags and labels for linux/amd64 and linux/arm64 platforms. The full job builds from the default Dockerfile, while the slim job uses a specific slim.Dockerfile and applies a custom readme description to the Docker Hub repository.
